allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Expand-Archive -Path V-Amber.zip -DestinationPath V-Amber-extracted -Force; Get-ChildItem -Recurse V-Amber-extracted | Select-Object FullName")
Bash(ssh -o BatchMode=yes -o ConnectTimeout=10 cloud 'echo OK && uname -a && ls ~/ 2>/dev/null | head -20')
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(a['id'], a['name'], a['type']\) for a in d.get\('attributes',[]\)]")
Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('/tmp/ms_meta.json'\)\); [print\(a['id'], '|', a['name'], '|', a['type']\) for a in d.get\('attributes',[]\)]")

Bash(curl -sw "\\nHTTP=%{http_code}\\n" --compressed -H "Authorization: Bearer f31155daf19a045916bbcae030def3c75f7981d0" -H "Accept-Encoding: gzip" -H "Accept: application/json;charset=utf-8" "https://api.moysklad.ru/api/remap/1.2/entity/counterparty/metadata" -o C:/temp/ms_meta.json)
Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('C:/temp/ms_meta.json',encoding='utf-8'\)\); [print\(a['id'], '|', a['name'], '|', a['type']\) for a in d.get\('attributes',[]\)]")
Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('C:/temp/ms_attrs.json',encoding='utf-8'\)\); [print\(a.get\('id'\),'|',a.get\('name'\),'|',a.get\('type'\)\) for a in d.get\('rows',[]\)]")

Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('C:/temp/check.json',encoding='utf-8'\)\); print\('name:',d.get\('name'\)\); [print\(' attr:',a.get\('name'\),'=',a.get\('value'\)\) for a in d.get\('attributes',[]\)]")
